title: Donuts Popping Time
description: Do you love bubble shooter games? Welcome to Donuts Popping Time, a donuts bubble shooting game! Aim and release to shoot to eleminate 3 or more donuts of the same color. Keep popping donuts and the background will change when you level up. Try to challenge people all over the world and make the highest score. Enjoy
instructions: Mouse click or touch screen to aim and shoot 3 or more donuts of the same color
